ab: pashtay maqitan piakalingkin piakaimahan. iza araiza ita.
ch: 大家好，大家平安。我們開始了。
en: Good day, everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: pashtay maqitan piakalingkin piakaimahan. thuini shinshii apishfazaq pashtay maniun kmuza sa akaanin a Thau a lalawa.
ch: 大家好，平安。今天老師要教大家食物的邵語怎麼說。
en: Hello, everyone, peace. Today, I am going to teach you how to say Shao for food.
A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: shinshii, maura iaku. shduu ihu qa uqthawan malhinuna?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ani iaku tunmaza, shduu ihu piara’inin lalawa?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: riqazuan uhu inai! uqtha untal iakin malhinuna mutal.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.

ab: uqthawan malhinuna. piara’inin mihu a lalawa.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.
B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.
B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: shimuluan uhu tatitish mihu a shirshir a tataal lhmupish a huruy.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: shduu mihu a tatitish ya shimulikuan?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: pananaiza lhmupish, uqthwan mapariqaz ya simaq.
ch: 我們就上到這裡，明天再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
